div.div: Execution Flow: ❶ Developer triggers pipeline → ❷ ADO dispatches to self-hosted agent pool → ❸ Agent picks up job, installs Terraform → ❹ Secrets injected from Variable Group as env vars → ❺ Terraform connects to bastion/clusters via SSH + API → ❻ Infrastructure provisioned on bare metal
